title: cleome isomeris
intro: Cleome isomeris, also known as Spider Flower or Spurred Cleome, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Cleome isomeris can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
